zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr是John de Varde和Catherine Appleyard的儿子，出生。他于大约1426年与Alice Kemp在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在英国英格兰素福爾可，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Varde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Fernando, Gerardo, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Rafael, Agustin, Alberto, Alina, Amalia.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Antimo, Heriberto, Aniello, Carlo, Carmine, Caesar, Ciro, Dino, Eliseo.

Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from verde ‘green’ (from Latin viridis), used as a nickname for someone who habitually dressed in this color or had green eyes, and, in Italy, also as a medieval personal name. Compare Laverde and Lo Verde .
Spanish: in some cases, a habitational name from any of the places called Verde, for example in A Coruña (Galicia).

variants.name: Laverde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Juan, Manuel, Adriana, Alvaro, Bernardo, Elena, Ezequiel, Francisca, Francisco, Jaime, Liliana.  Italian Dario, Leonardo, Salvatore.
Spanish; Italian (mainly La Verde): variant of Verde ‘green’, with (fused) definite article la.

variants.name: Verdi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Salvatore, Carmine, Pasquale, Antonio, Cesare, Gaetano, Geno, Giuseppe, Philomena, Rocco.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Verde  .

variants.name: Verdone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Marco, Salvatore, Agostino, Carlo, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Giuseppe.
Italian: from an augmentative of   Verde  .

variants.name: Lo Verde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Francesco, Vito, Antonio, Filomena, Gaspare, Giuseppe, Nichola, Nino, Santo, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern; also Loverde): variant of the nickname Verde 1 ‘green’, with the addition of the definite article lo.

variants.name: Virdi
meanings: Italian (mainly Sicily): regional variant of   Verde  .
Indian (Punjab): unexplained.

variants.name: Verdejo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Rafael, Jose, Natividad, Adela, Alberto, Alicia, Ana, Angel, Candido, Carlos, Catalino, Cruz.
Spanish:
variant of Berdejo, a habitational name from Berdejo, a town in Zaragoza.

variants.name: Verdino
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Verdino, a pet form of Verde .

variants.name: Verducci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Nicola, Pasco, Rocco, Vittorio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Verde   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr was born as the son of John de Varde and Catherine Appleyard. He married Alice Kemp about 1426, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1470, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr est né, fils de John de Varde et Catherine Appleyard. Il a épousé Alice Kemp environ 1426, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1470, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr wurde, als Sohn von John de Varde und Catherine Appleyard geboren. Er hat um 1426 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Alice Kemp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1470 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr è nato il come figlio di John de Varde e Catherine Appleyard. Lui sposato Alice Kemp circa 1426, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1470, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde SrはJohn de VardeとCatherine Appleyardの息子として生まれた。約1426年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAlice Kempと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで死去し，イギリスイギリススリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr(은)는 John de Varde(와)과 Catherine Appleyard의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Alice Kemp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr nasceu filho de John de Varde e Catherine Appleyard. Ele casou-se com Alice Kemp aproximadamente 1426, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1470, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr родился. Его родителей звали John de Varde и Catherine Appleyard. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Kemp около 1426 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Robert de Varde Sr nació como hijo de John de Varde y Catherine Appleyard. Se casó con Alice Kemp aproximadamente 1426, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1470, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
